/CAL:DEFENSE MOTION TO MODIFY RELEASE CONDITIONS/INTC/X:CERTIFIED LAW CLERK PAULINA SANTANA APPEARS UNDER THE SUPERBISION OF DPDKATHLEEN NATIVIDAD FOR THE DEFENSE,/ARG&SUB/MO DENIED/X:FUTURE DATES CONFIRMED,/

/CAL: DECISION ON 1382PC MOTION, LD 06-14-21 (COVID19), DA OPPOSITION, DEFENSE MOTION TO MODIFY CONDITIONS OF RELEASE/INTC/X: MOTION TO DISMISS PC 1382 DENIED/TEXT:TRANS TO DEPT 24/TRANS 24:FORTHWITH FOR DEFENSE MOTION TOMODIFY CONDITIONS OF RELEASE/X: FUTURE DATE 09-16-21 CONFIRMED/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/WIT SWORN:MICHAEL MONTERO, SFPD/WIT SWORN:NICHOLAS URBANO, SFPD/EXHMA:PEO 1) EVIDENCE ENVELOPE/EXHMA:PEO 1A & 1B) BAGS ALLEGEDLY CONTAINING A CONTROLLED SUBSTANCE/HTA1:1/CONTD:ARRAIGNMENT IN DEPT, 22/DOP/INTC/

/CAL:RETURNED FROM CJC TO ADDRESS TIME WAIVER/INTC/ORNAS/X:AS A CONDITIONOF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY/WEAP/RX/DEF:ADMONISHED TO STAY AWAY FROM 7TH & STEVENSON, ORDER FILED 02-16-21/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD:TRAILING #21000098/DOP

/X:***AMENDED MINUTE***/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDPX:03-30-21/987,2/BAIL:50000/CONTD: CJC ELIG/DOP/SAORD/SA2:7TH & STEVENSON STREET, SF,CA/INTC/
/INTC/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAW/DEFTARR/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDTR:06-14-21/CONTD: JURY TRIAL/DO
